---
title: Create Embeddings Tenant
description: 'Representative API page'
---

### Examples

<Tabs>
  <Tab title="API Request">
    ```bash
    curl --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'
    ```
  </Tab>
  <Tab title="TypeScript">
    ```ts
    client.embeddings.createCollection();
    ```
  </Tab>
</Tabs>

Create a tenant dedicated to responses under <200ms and direct embedding access.

- Query values like <tokenized_count are surfaced in the response payload.
